_comment_core: The core settings required for the bot to run and identify itself.

core._comment_prefix: The default prefix. Change to e.g. 'alias ' if using an alias bot. (Default: 'owo ')

_comment_stealth: Controls modular human-like behaviors to stay under the radar.

stealth._comment_human_break: Controls generic activity pausing. If on, it halts farming explicitly.

human_break._comment_duration: How long the break lasts in minutes. (Default: 10)
human_break._comment_interval: Triggers a break every X minutes. (Default: 45)

stealth._comment_typing: Natively mimics raw Discord keystroke delays.

typing._comment_reaction: Base wait time (seconds) before starting to type. (Default: min 1.0, max 3.0)
typing._comment_mistake: Percent chance to mistype an adjacent QWERTY key. (Default: 7)
typing._comment_lazy: Percent chance that if a mistake is made, to NOT backspace it. Submits the typo raw. (Default: 2)

stealth._comment_circadian: Simulates going to bed. The bot completely shuts down during these hours.

circadian_rhythm._comment_start: The local hour it goes to sleep in 24h. (Default: 1)
circadian_rhythm._comment_end: The local hour it wakes up in 24h. (Default: 8)

stealth._comment_syntax: Alters the command string to disrupt algorithm pattern recognition.

syntax_variance._comment_cap: Chance (%) to erroneously upper-case a letter like 'oWo hunt'. (Default: 15)
syntax_variance._comment_space: Chance (%) to accidentally hit the spacebar twice like 'owo  hunt'. (Default: 10)

stealth._comment_curiosity: Injects irrelevant commands like reading balance to break predictive farming sequences.

curiosity._comment_trigger: It will send one of the commands randomly between your X and Y farming command. (Default: min 100, max 250)

stealth._comment_fatigue: Simulates annoyance and fatigue after resolving a captcha verification.

post_captcha_fatigue._comment_delay: Stops all farming for X to Y seconds immediately after beating a captcha. (Default: min 30.0, max 120.0)
